candidate.headline: Rocket Lab press release headline: "Rocket Lab to Acquire Iridium in Historic Deal, Creating A Fully Vertically Integrated Space Powerhouse Primed for Growth"

held.reason: Headline and July 3, 2026 date confirmed on the rocketlabcorp.com/updates/ listing (fetched this run, HTTP 200, real content). The linked article page itself returned a Cloudflare 'Just a moment...' JS-challenge response on every attempt (WebFetch and curl with a descriptive User-Agent), so no deal terms, structure, or figures could be verified against the source text. Holding rather than publishing on a headline alone per hard rule 2/3; revisit once the article is reachable or an RKLB 8-K / Iridium primary source corroborates.
